title: Hotbar Borders
description: Hotbar borders to prevent over-scrolling left or right.
body:
Hotbar Borders is a tiny quality-of-life mod that fixes one of Minecraft’s most annoying quirks: scrolling past the edge of the hotbar and wrapping around to the other side.

Its a simple mod that prevents over-scrolling left or right in your hotbar:

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2141df19acac64491684201217229515f2338f71.gif)
